name: Date Input
summary: Date picker control using the `date` format on a string property
whenToUse: Collecting dates like birth dates, appointment dates, or deadlines
When you need calendar-based date selection with built-in format validation
notes: Use `format: "date"` in the data schema — the renderer automatically provides a date picker
The value is stored in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD)
No special UI schema options are needed; just a Control pointing to the property
